'''Maloc''' was a [[Commander/Legends|commander]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Starfleet]] serving as commanding officer of the [[Victory I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory I''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Stalwart (Victory-class)|''Stalwart'']] approximately [[3 ABY/Legends|one year before]] the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. He served under the command of then–[[Vice Admiral/Legends|Vice Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] throughout the construction of the [[Space station/Legends|space station]] [[NL-1]] in the [[Pakuuni system/Legends|Pakuuni system]], as well as throughout the campaign against the [[Pakuuni Pirates]].
